## Description

## Type of change

- [ ] New offer(s)
- [ ] New monetization model page
- [ ] New pricing pattern
- [ ] New resource(s)
- [ ] Fix (broken link, typo, invented pricing)
- [ ] Automated discovery PR
- [ ] Infrastructure

## Quality checklist

- [ ] No "guaranteed income", "passive income", or hype language
- [ ] Pricing signals cite their source
- [ ] No invented pricing data
- [ ] YAML validates without errors (`python scripts/validate_yaml.py`)
- [ ] No duplicate IDs
- [ ] Links are valid
